Patch Set 23:

Why do some of the Nokia copyrights say:

Copyright (c) ... Nokia. All rights reserved.
and some say
Copyright (c) ... Nokia.
and there's even one that says:
Copyright (c) ... NOKIA

I'm not sure which is supposed to be correct. I do know that my company's lawyers are very particular about how their copyright notices are spelled out.

I'm not going to block on this, but it's something you might consider looking into.

Patch Set 23: Code-Review+1

this needs some SME reviews
Change has been successfully merged by Vijay Venkatesh Kumar
